since_last: 16% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.47%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 16% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -2.59% · Gold -1.63% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 16% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.47%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.47%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.88%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -8.71%
cards.body: Leaders: IBM +2.89%, SAP +2.68%, NOW +1.82%, CRM +1.17%, INTU +1.07%. Laggards: MU -8.71%, MRVL -8.20%, INTC -7.95%, CEVA -7.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.20% at $148.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
